There’s no numbers on the aisles, so even if it had been there, how would you know where to look.  I was in the San Antonio store, so maybe some other stores are different, although, the Grand Prairie store apparently isn’t numbered either. I intended to buy some other items, but I wasted so much time looking for the swivels I wanted, I just left. I’ll go WalMart and just follow the directions on the app and walk straight to them.  Good grief.

title: Worst experience
text: Wanted to buy a gun so payed for it went to pick it up. I couldn’t because it hadn’t been 30 days since I purchased another hand gun and then the rules. I understand this and even though I waited 3 hours at the check out line, no exaggeration, it was my fault. I wait until the time is up and I can pick it up, but this time I need a receipt of my last gun purchase so they know the date. I get the receipt and show them, now I need to send it to the managers email. I send it and get nothing. I had to leave to do other things this trip 2.5 hours. Went back with a fully printed out receipt 2 weeks later and this time they told me I had to come in when a manager is in which is Friday Saturday and Sunday. The end of the story is they don’t give you all the information you need and keep you guessing. I still don’t have that thousand dollar gun I ordered despite spending over 8 hours in stores and driving over 4 hours to and fro. They wanted my time and money, I only wish I could do more than write a bad review.

title: It’s BPS, so what you expect? Actually More
text: How many big box stores are there? Have no idea, but BPS is obv one of them. Naturally, they have to do business as 1 right? Not actually! Honestly, when it comes to certain things I buy & shop at small local shops who support our family businesses. But, certain other items they don’t or can’t carry turn to Cabelas/BPS. Can get anything from clothing, footwear, eyewear, tackle, boat accessories & even the boat. They’re human like rest of us & Nat make mistakes. What’s different, how they handle the situation. Unfortunately, recently had two situations from online orders. Potentially the biggest being shippers fault. Purchased 2 Hummingbird 10” Helix units, misc items for installation, 24V 80lb Ultrex and was obv given the delivery date as signature is required. Made sure to be home of course never showed. Called shipper said never got anything from BPS to even pick up yet had been posting tracking updates. Said call BPS so did. Explained situation. Asked for time until next morning. True to word next morning got email from executive apologizing, call from management, refunded the shipping costs, paid for another exact order to be sent that day overnight shipping which probably wasn’t cheap. Showed up as promised by different shipper with no issues. Second was reel. Came in with scratches all over it, lake water grime on usual places, one item missing. Again called and got great service, communication and more follow up from higher level management. Asked for a few hours. Before getting call back I got email with tracking number, and notification from bank of refund for exact amount of purchase. When came in was new reel, supplies to send old back, gift card for same amount of refund, reel oil, cleaning kit and smaller items. Can’t ask for anything above that when never even ask for in 1st place. Will cont to do business and recommend all the time.
